_comment: Phase 3 SPICE exchange contract, canonical structural form. Pairs with spice_exchange_inverter.spice. The netlist lane asserts its SPICE writer emits this structure from an extracted DeviceNetlist (reticle-extract device.rs: kind, terminal nets, and W/L in DBU); the xschem lane asserts its reader parses this structure. Params w/l are strings (decimal microns, DBU divided by the tech dbu-per-micron) so the fixture is byte-stable and free of float-formatting drift. Reticle extracts W/L only: area/perimeter (ad/pd/as/ps) are deliberately absent. Probes bridge SPICE nodes to F4 waveform records (Quantity variants voltage/current/charge).
